raw_text:
WARNING [TC-B-004] interface.f90:5 <-> header.h:2  param[1] 'offset'
  PLATFORM_DEPENDENT: INTEGER(c_long) / C 'long' are both platform-dependent.
  Linux LP64: 8 bytes. Windows LLP64: 4 bytes. Interface is non-portable.
  Recommend: use INTEGER(c_int64_t) / int64_t for explicit 64-bit offsets.
